articles.title: Due to DMA, Siri AI delayed in EU for iOS 27 and iPadOS 27 - Apple
articles.description: Due to the Digital Markets Act, Apple will not be able to ship Siri AI in the European Union with the release of iOS 27 and iPadOS 27.
articles.content:
June 8, 2026
UPDATE
Due to DMA, Siri AI delayed in EU for iOS 27 and iPadOS 27
Siri AI will be available to EU users on macOS 27, visionOS 27, and watchOS 27
Apple today introduced Siri AI, an en… [+3797 chars]
